zh.lifeSummary: 當Agatha de Ferrers於1234年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾德比時，她的父親Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby42歲，母親Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby33歲。她與Hugh de Mortimer III結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1306年5月22日在英國英格蘭賀福爾維格莫享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agatha de Ferrers于1234年出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾德比时，她的父亲Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby42岁，母亲Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby33岁。她与Hugh de Mortimer III结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1306年5月22日在英国英格兰賀福爾維格莫享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ferrers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire (Eure) and Ferrières (Manche).

variants.name: Ferris
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, or from the Scottish-Gaelic form of this personal name, Fearghus (see Fergus ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure and Ferrières, La Manche in Normandy, France.

variants.name: Ferridge
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a form of Ferris and therefore a variant of Ferrers .

nameMeanings.name: Agatha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Agnes   and   Agatha .

variants.name: Agnes
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agatha de Ferrers was born in 1234, in Derby, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby, was 42 and her mother, Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby, was 33. She married Hugh de Mortimer III. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 22 May 1306, in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agatha de Ferrers est née en 1234, à Derby, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh de Mortimer III. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 22 mai 1306, à Wigmore, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agatha de Ferrers 1234 in Derby, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby 42 und ihre Mutter Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby 33. Sie hat Hugh de Mortimer III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 22. Mai 1306 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agatha de Ferrers è nata il nel 1234 nel Derby, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Hugh de Mortimer III. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 22 maggio 1306, nel Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agatha de Ferrersが1234年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアデルビーで生まれた時，父Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derbyは42歳，母Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derbyは33歳であった。Hugh de Mortimer IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1306年5月22日にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィグモーで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agatha de Ferrers(이)가 1234년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 더비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 Hugh de Mortimer III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1306년 5월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 위그모어에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agatha de Ferrers nasceu em 1234, em Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh de Mortimer III. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 22 de maio de 1306, em Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agatha de Ferrers родилась в 1234 г. в местности дирби, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh de Mortimer III. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 22 мая 1306 г. в местности вигмор, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agatha de Ferrers nació en 1234, en Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Hugh de Mortimer III. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 22 de mayo de 1306, en Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 72 años.
